name: primary_key
description: Stage identity. For run-bigquery-gold the M22 path constructs '<site_id>|<iso_utc_timestamp>' deterministically (source_flux_df=None — silver-from-BQ is processed stage-1 output, not raw bronze flux, so the M10 source-flux primary_key pass-through path is intentionally skipped). validate_stage_table aborts the writeback on null or duplicate values.

name: site_id
description: Site identifier. Per-row category value: under the M24 all-data grouped CLI, --group-column site_id partitions the silver BigQuery read into per-category gold runs; each per-category run uses its group's category as the stage-identity site_id, and the per-group gold stage frames are concatenated into one stacked payload before gold writeback. Together with timestamp this is the MERGE identity key; on a successful explicit MERGE the watermark advances per-site (one cf_s2_watermark row per stacked site).

name: timestamp
description: Half-hour observation timestamp in UTC. Together with site_id this is the MERGE identity key (M8 contract; non-key columns including primary_key are updated on match).

name: DateTime
description: Tz-aware half-hour timestamp. Same value as `timestamp` when staged; preserved so downstream consumers that read by DateTime keep working.

name: dateAndTime
description: Formatted `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` string built from DateTime by prepare_stage_dataframe. Carried for parity with the legacy `_s2_filt_1` lakehouse target schema (guide 001 section 2.1).

name: NEE
description: Net ecosystem exchange (renamed from co2_flux); the pre-gap-fill flux that the backend conditioned NEE_f on. Part of the 13-column backend contract.

name: NEE_f
description: Gap-filled NEE produced by the backend (hesseflux MDS or REddyProc). 13-column backend contract.

name: NEE_fqc
description: Gap-filled NEE quality class (0/1/2/3 = direct/short/medium/long-window MDS fill). 13-column backend contract.

name: GPP
description: Gross primary production from Lasslop partitioning. 13-column backend contract.

name: Reco
description: Ecosystem respiration. Native partitioning by default; opt-in Lloyd-Taylor-aligned wrapper available for REddyProc-comparability studies (Decision 011, no silent fallback). 13-column backend contract.

name: Tair
description: Air temperature in degrees C carried through unchanged from silver. 13-column backend contract.

name: Tair_f
description: Gap-filled air temperature. 13-column backend contract.

name: Rg
description: Incoming shortwave radiation carried through unchanged from silver. 13-column backend contract.

name: Rg_f
description: Gap-filled shortwave radiation. 13-column backend contract.

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit carried through unchanged from silver. 13-column backend contract.

name: VPD_f
description: Gap-filled VPD. 13-column backend contract.

name: USTAR
description: Friction velocity carried through unchanged from silver. 13-column backend contract.

name: nee_f
description: Lowercase mirror of NEE_f. Built by S2_FILT_1_RENAME_MAP for parity with the legacy lakehouse target table `manglaria-staging.manglaria_lakehouse_ds.carbon_flux_eddycovariance_s2_filt_1` (guide 001 section 2.1).

name: nee_fqc
description: Lowercase mirror of NEE_fqc.

name: sw_in_f
description: Lowercase mirror of Rg_f.

name: ta_f
description: Lowercase mirror of Tair_f.

name: vpd_f
description: Lowercase mirror of VPD_f.

name: QC_NEE
description: Pre-backend QC class for NEE (silver-only column reattached onto gold via _attach_silver_columns_to_gold).

name: H
description: Sensible heat flux (silver-only column reattached onto gold).

name: LE
description: Latent heat flux (silver-only column reattached onto gold).

name: P_RAIN
description: Half-hour precipitation (silver-only column reattached onto gold).

name: rH
description: Relative humidity (silver-only column reattached onto gold).
